modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to schedule a meeting in Microsoft Teams.

full_description_text: User is trying to set up a meeting in Teams. They don't know the steps to do it. It's causing some confusion and delays.
short_description: Unable to schedule a meeting in Microsoft Teams.
description: User is trying to set up a meeting in Teams. They don't know the steps to do it. It's causing some confusion and delays.
